title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: redis:7 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for redis:7 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: Redis is an advanced key-value store. It is often referred to as a data-structure server since keys can contain strings, hashes, lists, sets, and sorted sets. For performance, Redis works with an in-memory data set. You can persist it either by dumping the data set to disk every once in a while, or by appending each command to a log.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Fix ImageMode installations using Redis (JIRA:RHEL-85603)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
full_text:
An update for redis:7 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

Redis is an advanced key-value store. It is often referred to as a data-structure server since keys can contain strings, hashes, lists, sets, and sorted sets. For performance, Redis works with an in-memory data set. You can persist it either by dumping the data set to disk every once in a while, or by appending each command to a log.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Fix ImageMode installations using Redis (JIRA:RHEL-85603)
